hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_response.filePath // .tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$f" in *.ts|*.tsx) ;; *) exit 0 ;; esac; case "$f" in */apps/api/*) WS=apps/api ;; */apps/web/*) WS=apps/web ;; */packages/shared/*) WS=packages/shared ;; *) exit 0 ;; esac; cd "/home/delangi/문서/project/category/bootcamp_game/$WS" || exit 0; out=$(npx --no-install tsc --noEmit 2>&1); rc=$?; [ $rc -ne 0 ] && printf '%s\n' "$out" | sed 's/^/[Layer1 tsc] /' | head -40; exit 0
